recommendations.title: Resurrection
recommendations.overview: A woman's carefully constructed life is upended when an unwelcome shadow from her past returns, forcing her to confront the monster she's evaded for two decades.

recommendations.title: Sightless
recommendations.overview: After an attack renders her blind, Ellen withdraws from the world to recover. But soon she plunges into paranoia, unable to convince anyone that her assailant has returned to terrorize her by hiding in plain sight.

recommendations.title: The Last Supper
recommendations.overview: A group of idealistic but frustrated liberals succumb to the temptation of murdering right-wing pundits for their political beliefs.

recommendations.title: Recurrence
recommendations.overview: Years after moving to a remote town, ex-cop Pipa is pulled back into the dark world she thought she'd left behind when a corpse appears on her property.

recommendations.title: Bomb City
recommendations.overview: An ongoing feud between punk rockers and a more affluent clique in a small Texas town leads to a hate crime.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: Toxic Love
recommendations.overview: The alienating and repetitive life of a group of heroin junkies in 1980s Rome.

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

recommendations.title: The Devil Below
recommendations.overview: A group of four amateur adventurers who specialize in exploring remote and forsaken places pay a visit to Shookum Hills, a town in the remote Appalachian Mountains which was abandoned decades ago due to a mysterious coal mine fire.

recommendations.title: Squid Game: Fireplace
recommendations.overview: Come share a toast in the Front Man's lair — but tread carefully, for you’re playing with fire.
